purpose: Establish whether existing reviewed Knowledge is sufficient for a reader-facing community overview without opening a new ingestion or Knowledge campaign.
allowed_scope: Guilds and DACs as social and economic institutions
Community publications, broadcasts and creator roles
Identity and affiliation examples already adjudicated in Knowledge
Star Atlas-relevant relationships, disagreements and context
prohibited_inferences: Current guild membership or leadership from historical tags
An exhaustive or ranked roster of important people
Off-topic politics, unrelated games or unrelated personal attacks as Star Atlas knowledge
Reputation judgments or allegations without attributable evidence
Product delivery from community belief or repetition
explicit_exclusions: Intergalactic Herald is not a central narrative source or profile in this initial portfolio, per operator direction.
limitations: Guild formation, leadership and active-period records are incomplete.
Most people lack complete dated role histories.
Native Discord channel and message context remains incomplete.
The overview cannot substitute for future individual, guild or event dossiers.
future_knowledge_dependencies: Dated guild founding and leadership records
Evidence packets for individual biographies and rivalry histories
